kings_guild.name: The King's Guild
kings_guild.description: Master artisans of the King's Guild each ply a different trade in a different quarter of the city. Work out who's who.
clues: More members of the South Side are in the Joiners' Guild than members of the North Side.
At least one of the artisan in Kingsford and the artisan with 14 coins belongs to the Clothiers' Guild.
Matilda, Mason, Riverside, and 12 coins belong to different artisans.
Either Blacksmith goes with Rowan or someone in the North Side goes with Rowan (but not both).
Wulfric's levy is lower than both the Blacksmith and the artisan in Bridgegate.
Either Rowan goes with Blacksmith, or Weaver goes with 12 coins — but not both.
16 coins goes with none of Edmund, Riverside, or Southgate.
Aldric, Rowan, and Wulfric go with Cooper, Kingsford, and 10 coins, in some order.
Either Cooper goes with Southgate or Cooper goes with Matilda.
The artisan with 12 coins does not belong to the Hill Ward if and only if 18 coins goes with Mason.
Aldric's levy is higher than both the Mason and the artisan in Millpond.
If Cooper does not go with Eastcheap, then Aldric goes with Cooper.
Tanner goes with exactly one of Edmund, 12 coins, or 14 coins.
